converged.action: Treat deck 3,100 active installs / 240 orgs and $18k MRR / +40% MoM as uncleared non-evidence that cannot carry underwriting until reconciled
Keep Ferrite in diligence on independently verified shipping and launch-thread presence; do not kill solely on public registry totals

residual.fork: Under registry-order compression with deck commercial claims at zero weight: write $100k on execution residual (shipping + inflection + reachable production users) vs wait for reconciled billing/telemetry before any check

positions.position: Wait under the compression/failed-reconciliation assumption—category error blocks treating registry lifetime as a hard falsification, but unresolved scale after a failed channel map blocks a fast check; shipping keeps diligence open only
Wait—billing export must clear first; shipping and launch users keep diligence open but do not repair a broken commercial measurement chain on the same ask
Write $100k if two or three reachable production users still name a concrete agent-CI cost/latency win this week; contested dashboards are diligence debt, not a veto at this check size
Wait for same-window active-install telemetry definition and a reproducible 10x protocol; presence ≠ protocol and cannot stand in for contested primary magnitudes
Write $100k—zero-weight failed deck scale as priced uncertainty; inflection plus verified craft and thin-but-reachable users is enough residue unless usage path evaporates

instrument.for_fork: Under registry-order compression with deck commercial claims at zero weight: write $100k on execution residual (shipping + inflection + reachable production users) vs wait for reconciled billing/telemetry before any check
instrument.move: Same-week diligence packet: (1) contact the three launch-thread production users or two founder-introduced current users for an unscripted agent-CI cost/latency win; (2) pull trailing-4-month payment-processor/billing export (plan mix, refunds, customer count) plus product telemetry/admin export defining active install and organization with an explicit distribution-channel map for the deck window (and a one-page 10x protocol). Collapse rule: if users evaporate or show no production residue → write-side joins wait; if billing/telemetry clears coherent paid/active reality (or an honest correction with residual usage) → wait-side reassesses off the block; if reconciliation fails and residue disappears → all seats wait.

authority_note: Agent-derived adjudication from the forum record—material for the investor to argue with, not an authority. Forum verdicts never settle their own case.
